Translation of Arbeit | PASSWORD German–English Dictionary Arbeit noun job [noun] a person’s daily work or employment effort, work, human expenditure Synonyms: Aufwand, Mühe Das ist mir zu viel Arbeit. ― This is too much effort for me.
